title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Cancel
scenario: Verify that tapping Cancel on the Login dialog closes the dialog and returns the user to the previous screen with Login and Share Data buttons still visible.
steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen where the Login dialog appears.
Tap the Cancel button on the Login dialog.
Observe the dialog behavior and the resulting screen.
expected: The Login dialog closes, the user is returned to the previous screen, and the Login and Share Data buttons remain visible.
